privileged_info_summary: The forensic_audit_report_formatting task uses synthetic data generated via Pythons odfpy library. The initial unformatted report is saved to /home/ga/Documents/project_chariot_investigation.odt, and a formatting guidelines document is placed at /home/ga/Desktop/audit_formatting_guidelines.txt. The guidelines require formatting specific headings (H1 for Executive Summary, Investigation Scope, Findings, Transaction Analysis, Internal Control Recommendations; H2 for Finding 1: Fictitious Vendor Creation and Finding 2: Invoice Splitting), applying bold text to entities "Apex Consulting LLC" and "Meridian Solutions", and formatting the report title. A character count check reveals that the original document has 3227 characters, directly contradicting the metadata claim of 2500. All other paths, strings, and formatting targets perfectly match the explicit task scripts.
